auth.name: Name (optional)
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account, then
auth.checkEmailResetBody: If an account with that email exists, we sent a password reset link.

help.title: How Mampfi works
help.intro: Mampfi helps groups coordinate daily group orders — e.g. breakfast at the office. One member buys, all others pre-order and expenses are settled transparently afterwards.
help.createEventText: Create an event with a name, date range, and price list. You become the admin automatically. Invite others via invite link (Admin tab).
help.placeOrdersText: In the Day tab, pick a date and set your quantities per item. Orders lock on the previous day at the configured cutoff time. Your last order rolls over to the next day automatically, if you want.
help.finalizeText: The buyer finalizes the purchase via "Finalize from Aggregate". If actual quantities differ, adjustments can be made before submitting.
help.paymentsText: The Payments tab shows your balance. Create payments to other members — the recipient must confirm each payment. Once your balance is 0, you can leave the event.
help.languageText: Switch the language using the dropdown in the top right. Your choice is saved.
help.glossaryCutoff: Cutoff time — After this time on the previous day, orders for the next day can no longer be changed.
help.glossaryRollover: Rollover — When enabled, your last saved order is automatically carried over to all following days until you change it. When disabled, days without an explicit order are empty. Explicit orders for specific days are always preserved regardless of this setting.
help.glossaryFinalize: Finalize purchase — The buyer records what was actually purchased. Quantities can be adjusted (e.g. for shortages or substitutions).
help.glossaryBalance: Balance — Your personal account balance in the event. Positive = you are owed money, negative = you owe money.

members.title: Members
members.name: Name
members.confirmRemoveUnbalanced: {{name}} has a balance of {{amount}}. Orders will be blocked but payments remain possible. Remove?
members.noteHint: Note for other members (e.g. preferences & allergies)

day.lockInfo: Orders lock on the previous day at {{time}}.
day.rolloverHintOn: Your orders are automatically carried forward each day. You can adjust them at any time.
day.rolloverHintOff: Rollover is disabled. Each day starts with an empty order.
day.rolloverDisabled: Rollover disabled — starting empty for this day
day.leftEvent: You left this event on {{date}}. Orders after this date are not available.
day.notActiveMember: You are not an active member for this date.
day.inactiveItems: Note: {{count}} item(s) in your saved order are no longer available and will be ignored when saving.
day.forBuyerHint: Did you handle today's purchase? Record your expenses now!
day.purchaseCompletedHint: The purchase for this day has already been recorded.
day.invalidateConfirm: Revert finalization? The day can then be re-finalized.
day.receiptHint: Photo of receipt (JPEG, PNG, WebP, max 10 MB)
day.everythingAsOrderedDesc: Did you buy all items as requested, or do you need to record adjustments (shortages or substitutions)?
day.cannotFinalizeFuture: Purchases can only be finalized from the respective day onwards.

payments.leaveHint: Mark your intent and settle your balance to leave.
payments.removedByAdmin: You were removed from this event. Please settle your outstanding balance.
payments.balanceSettledLeft: Your balance is settled. You have fully left the event.
payments.youOwe: You owe {{amount}} {{currency}}. Pay the following to get even:
payments.allSettlementsPending: Settlement payments created — awaiting confirmation from recipients.
payments.youShouldReceive: You should receive {{amount}} {{currency}}. Ask the following to pay you:
payments.balanceNotZeroOwe: Your balance is not zero. You owe {{amount}} {{currency}}.
payments.payToGetEven: Pay the following to get even:
payments.balanceNotZeroReceive: Your balance is not zero. You should receive {{amount}} {{currency}}.
payments.askToPayYou: Ask the following to pay you:

admin.priceListHint: Prices are fixed; to change prices, add a new item and deactivate the old one.
admin.cutoffHint: Orders for the next day lock at this time on the previous day.
admin.holidaysHint: Configure which public holidays to show in the calendar and day view.
admin.name: Name
admin.emailInvitesHint: Send invite links via email. Comma or space separated addresses.
admin.shareHint: Share either the URL or token. Users can redeem at /join.
admin.deliveryFeeHint: Optional flat fee for the buyer. Leave empty to disable.
admin.deleteEventConfirm: Really delete this event? All data will be permanently removed.
